/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=auto -fno-fat-lto-objects -fsanitize=undefined -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/logmind-stress-test.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/logmind-stress-test.dir/logmind-stress-test_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logmind-stress-test.dir/stress/stress_test.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logmind-stress-test.dir/__/src/daemon/log_buffer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logmind-stress-test.dir/__/src/daemon/plugin_api.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logmind-stress-test.dir/__/src/daemon/pipeline.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logmind-stress-test.dir/__/src/daemon/plugin_loader.cpp.o" -o logmind-stress-test  -ldl -lpthread
